build_infrastructure.note: HSF uses Harness Cloud — no Kubernetes connector needed

Provision_Workspace.name: Provision Workspace
Provision_Workspace.description: HSF provided pipeline intended to Provision an IACM workspace

trigger_workspace_on_git_file_change.name: Trigger Workspace on Git File Change
trigger_workspace_on_git_file_change.description: Session 1 primitive — wires a Git file merge to an IACM workspace apply

discovery_gaps: No RBMarketplace GitHub connector exists — connector_map uses account.github for Kru3ish org only
No Kubernetes connector — HSF uses Harness Cloud (runtime: Cloud), not K8s
No existing CI pipeline template for containerize-and-push — Stage 3 trigger targets will need a pipeline_identifier input
Developer project list is manually curated — no 'developer' tag on projects to auto-filter
